title: Video Calls: Basics
drDigitalIntro:
Video calling lets you see and talk to someone face-to-face.
• Apps like Zoom, Google Meet, and WhatsApp all do video calls.
• Pick a contact and tap the video call button.
• Your camera turns on; tap the red phone icon to end the call.

playgroundTask.goal: You started and ended a video call

steps.say: Click on Grandma to open her conversation.
Start a video call with Grandma — click the green Video Call button.
Great! You're connected. Now end the call by clicking the red phone button.

drDigitalSuccess: You made a video call! The green button starts it, the red button ends it. That's all there is to it.
drDigitalHint: Select Grandma first, then click the green Video Call button at the top of the chat.
